MP+DREDge (monopolar + rigid DREDge drift correction) — NPUltra/ZYE-0057_ses-2 — interactive localization · aggregate (l_x, l_y, l_z) + α · click any panel to inspect the nearest spike

α dimension = MP monopolar log₁₀α (model has no α head). Background = 12k-spike sample (looks like all spikes); 1000 spikes are silently interactive — a click snaps to the nearest one and renders its waveforms + 3-D localization on the right.
Colour dots by:
click a panel to inspect a spike…
Aggregate global localizations (motion-corrected x, y, z) — aggregate-projections layout · white ▪ = channels · click to inspect
UnitMatch — click a coloured dot to show its unit's average waveform (10 nearest channels), centroid trajectory, and best cross-session match (6 scores + total T). Solid = clicked unit · dashed = matched unit.
